page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.medium is an x86_64 architecture server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is configured with 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs, operating at a ratio of 1.0 thread per core. The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a resource density of 1.0 GB of memory per core.

This instance does not include any local storage, meaning all data persistence must be handled via network-attached block storage. Additionally, there are zero integrated GPUs and no complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with the server. The dedicated CPU allocation and single-thread-per-core design ensure that processing resources are not shared with other tenants at the thread level.

With a low memory-to-vCPU ratio of 1:1, the ecs.c2.medium is structured for compute-heavy workloads that require dedicated CPU execution without a large memory footprint. This resource profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for CPU-bound tasks such as batch processing, mathematical modeling, and distributed compute nodes, though the lack of local storage and low memory density represent clear tradeoffs for database or caching workloads.
description: The Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.medium is a compute-focused virtual machine running on the KVM hypervisor with an x86_64 architecture. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs, operating at a strict ratio of one thread per core to prevent resource contention. The instance provides 16.0 GB of system memory, establishing a low memory-to-CPU ratio of 1.0 GB per core. It contains no local storage and no integrated GPUs, requiring external network-attached storage for data persistence. This hardware profile is designed for CPU-bound workloads that do not demand large memory footprints, such as batch processing, computational modeling, and distributed compilation.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.medium is an x86_64 compute-optimized instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores, 16 vCPUs, and 16.0 GB of RAM, operating on the KVM hypervisor with no local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.medium is a KVM-based x86_64 instance with 16 dedicated vCPUs, 16.0 GB of RAM, and no bundled local storage.
tagline: A dedicated sixteen-core compute instance featuring a one-to-one ratio of gigabytes of memory to physical processing cores.

16.0 GB of system memory providing 1.0 GB per core
KVM hypervisor on x86_64 CPU architecture
